attacking_style: Attacks 4-6km from HC summit finishes when in GC contention, or opportunistically from breakaways when out of GC. Shows tendency to attack repeatedly for KOM points rather than committing to single decisive move.
team_tactics: Minimal domestique support visible; often isolated when key selections happen. Team exhausts itself in early chasing, leaving him exposed. Late-career shift to targeting KOM classification with minimal team commitment.
terrain_preference: HC summit finishes suit him best (Tourmalet winner 2019, multiple Giro stage podiums). Exposed catastrophically on flat stages with crosswinds and consistently weak in ITTs (40-50 second losses typical).
vulnerability: Chronic ITT weakness loses 1:00-1:30 to contenders. Positioning failures in crosswinds (lost 1:16 in 2019 TdF). Physical fragility under sustained pressure (bonked consecutive days 2018 Giro, injury abandon 2019 TdF). Poor finishing sprint conversion despite creating selections.
key_patterns: ITT performances consistently lose 30-50 seconds to GC rivals, confirmed across 6+ observations
Late-career pivot to KOM jersey farming via early breaks, abandoning after points collected (4 instances 2023)
Attacks repeatedly but lacks decisive acceleration; creates selections but loses sprints from them (5+ occasions)
Tactically exploits bonus seconds when GC riders mispositioned, showing sharp race-reading (4 documented instances)
Physical fragility: bonked multiple consecutive days, withdrew mid-race when under pressure (3 major incidents)
Opportunistic breakaway wins when GC favorites marked each other, attacking 6km out (2018 Vuelta pattern)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 observations show shift from GC ambition to KOM classification farming. Mechanicals derailed stage wins, excessive attacking without distancing rivals. Acknowledged final GT appearance signals career decline despite occasional breakaway form.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8
